title: Luffy Carries the Flag’s Meaning
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on luffy carries the flag’s meaning, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Luffy Carries the Flag’s Meaning. Luffy understands the meaning of Hiriluk’s flag and refuses to let Wapol treat it like a decoration. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Just hang on tight,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And I'll take you to the castle in no time...!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: usOP...

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Umm... no offense but... I think this might be impossi-

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: No, it's possible!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Just you wait...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: You said you wanted to fight for your country, right? And that you wanted to settle things for good, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Well don't you worry!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: I won't let your Determina- Tion go to waste!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: for the love of God...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: ...All I gotta do is take you up the mountain, right?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: ZORO...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell, man!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Oww! Knock it off! What was that for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I was just about to go full-out serious- mode when you butted in!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Sure you were...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Wait!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you're serious about going,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We can fix up a ropeway that'll take you to the top within 30 minutes!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It'll be much faster that way!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What? Aren't all the ropeways leading to the castle taken down currently...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: not quite. Somebody set up one white ropeway leading up to the castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's located at the outskirts of Gyasta.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: gyasta!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's the village Dr. Kureha was last spotted at!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The true meaning of that flag?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Mahahaha! As if there's any deep meaning behind some stupid fluff that pirates use as decoration!

summary: This part highlights luffy carries the flag’s meaning and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
